author: hamy@hamy.xyz
text: Scope: git rm -r packages/common/tmux/, drop 'tmux' from packages_common in justfile, drop tmux from both Linux and macOS install-deps, remove README cheatsheet entry. Also dissolves the WRK-001 P3 followup about ~/.tmux.os.<key>.conf path deviation. Land as a separate commit on main after WRK-001 merges, not on the WRK-001 branch.

author: hamy@hamy.xyz
text:
Follow-up to tg-g263e (MVP — workspace pills only, completed at commit b3d8e26).

Scope: port waybar's system widgets to SketchyBar to mirror Linux bar. Reference module configs in packages/linux/waybar/.config/waybar/config.jsonc — clock, battery, network (wifi/ethernet), pulseaudio, cpu, memory, disk. Skip 'backlight' (Mac handles natively). Skip 'tray' for now (no easy SketchyBar equivalent; revisit if needed). Skip 'custom/caffeine' and 'custom/bandwidth' — Linux-specific scripts; revisit later.

Layout: workspace pills stay rightmost on the right side. System widgets sit just to the LEFT of the pills (still on right half of bar). Order proposal (right-to-left from pills): clock, battery, wifi, audio, memory, cpu, disk — frequently-glanced first. Final order TBD on Mac.

Icons: SF Symbols (built-in on macOS, no install). waybar uses Font Awesome 6 unicode points; do NOT port those — they won't render. SketchyBar items support icon.font='SF Pro:Semibold:13.0' and icon as the SF Symbol name or unicode point.

Refresh: per-item via SketchyBar's update_freq (seconds). Suggested: clock 30s, battery 60s, wifi 5s, pulseaudio event-driven (subscribe to volume_change), cpu 5s, memory 10s, disk 60s. No global tick.

Convention: one plugin script per module under packages/macos/sketchybar/.config/sketchybar/plugins/, matching the shape of aerospace_workspaces.sh — bash, set -uo pipefail, defensive against missing CLIs. Keep sketchybarrc declarative (just --add + --set + --subscribe).

Palette: reuse the constants already defined in sketchybarrc (COLOR_BG, COLOR_FG, COLOR_ACTIVE) — extend if needed (waybar has warn/crit thresholds for cpu/memory/battery; mirror those colors).

Out of scope (post-post-MVP): click handlers, animations, tooltips, per-app icons, MDM detection.
